$comment: Single source of truth (SoT) for the Xpair Remote Desktop screen protocol. host/rd/(serve.rs·serve_webrtc.rs) and client/ide/(remote-desktop.js·extension.js) implement this contract, and check-screen-protocol.sh verifies consistency.

remoteInput.policy: Remote Desktop is view-only. The IDE must not capture or forward pointer, wheel, text, or keyboard input.
remoteInput.webrtcDataChannels: No client-created DataChannels; host-created channels, including legacy rp-ctl/rp-move, are closed or ignored.
